title: Desaturated & Variated Podzol
description: A Resource Pack that changes the color of podzol to be a little less of an eyesore, with some extra variations!
body:
Here is a pack that changes the look of default Podzol to be less of an eyesore. Additionally, Podzol now has 3 additional varients to spice up your terrain!
The Default pack uses Vanilla Tweak's Podzol side texture with the new color, if you would like to use the Vanilla Podzol side texture but recolored, delete podzol_side.png in the textures folder and rename podzol_sideSHORT.png to podzol_side.png.
Credits:
Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/
